name: Creatinine Clearance Calculator
seo_description: Use our free creatinine clearance (cockcroft-gault) to quickly estimate crcl based on age, weight, creatinine. Not registration needed.
result_context: The clearance >90 mL/min is standard; <60 indica enfermedad renal crónica that requires evaluation médica.
formula_display: CrCl = ((140 - edad) × weight × 0.85 if mujer) ÷ (72 × creatinine)
steps: The calculador apply the formula automatically and muestra results
mistakes: Not verifying that age are in correct units before Calculate
Redondear values intermediums before of the calculation final (pierde precision)
Apply results without Consider contexto individual or condition is special
desc: Free online creatinine clearance (cockcroft-gault). Enter age and weight to get instant results.
